description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular toolbox with a military-inspired design, predominantly olive green with black and yellow accents. The body features reinforced edges and molded panels for durability, with a prominent yellow handle on top for easy carrying. The front side displays a large, textured latch area, likely for secure closure, and the sides have circular, yellow-highlighted end caps that may serve as additional reinforcement or design elements. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, with a matte finish and subtle texturing for grip. The overall construction suggests it is designed for heavy-duty use, suitable for storing and transporting tools in urban or industrial environments. No visible branding or external labels are present, and the compartment configuration is implied to be a single large internal space.
description: A rugged olive green toolbox with a yellow handle, reinforced edges, and a secure latch area, designed for heavy-duty tool storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing a circular yellow-highlighted end cap and the ribbed structure of the toolbox.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main latch area, molded panel details, and the yellow handle on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the circular yellow end cap and ribbed design seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel with reinforced molding and the yellow handle visible on top.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed handle on top, rectangular with rounded edges, made of yellow plastic, ergonomically shaped for grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Large front clasp latch, likely plastic with textured grip, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, no visible trays or dividers from exterior.
